mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.post_id AS postId, c.parent_id AS parentId, c.user_id AS userId, c.content, c.created_at AS createdAt, u.nickname AS authorNickname, u.avatar AS authorAvatar FROM comments c JOIN users u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.post_id = #{postId} ORDER BY c.created_at ASC

SELECT c.id, c.post_id AS postId, c.parent_id AS parentId, c.user_id AS userId, c.content, c.created_at AS createdAt, u.nickname AS authorNickname, u.avatar AS authorAvatar FROM comments c JOIN users u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comments (id, post_id, parent_id, user_id, content) VALUES (#{id}, #{postId}, #{parentId}, #{userId}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM comments WHERE post_id = #{postId}
